classes.title: Introduction to Texicans and Early Texas
classes.summary: This class introduces the term 'Texican' and the early history of Texas.
terminal: Define 'Texican' and describe their role in early Texas history
enabling: Explain the origins of the term 'Texican'
Identify key characteristics of early Texas settlers
Discuss the cultural and political landscape of early Texas

classes.title: Causes of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class explores the causes leading to the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: List and explain the primary causes of the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Identify key political and social tensions between Texas settlers and the Mexican government
Discuss the impact of the Law of April 6, 1830
Explain the significance of the Battle of Gonzales

classes.title: Major Battles of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class covers the major battles during the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Describe the major battles and their outcomes in the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Identify key battles such as the Alamo, Goliad, and San Jacinto
Discuss the strategies and outcomes of each battle
Explain the significance of each battle in the context of the war

classes.title: Historical Figures and Folklore of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class introduces key figures and folklore from the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Identify and describe key figures and folklore from the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Discuss the roles of figures like Sam Houston, Stephen F. Austin, and Santa Anna
Explain the folklore surrounding the heroes of the Alamo
Describe the contributions of lesser-known figures

classes.title: Outcomes of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class examines the outcomes of the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Explain the outcomes and impact of the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Discuss the Treaty of Velasco and its terms
Describe the immediate political and social changes in Texas
Analyze the war's impact on relations between Texas and Mexico

classes.title: Sam Houston and the Rough Riders
classes.summary: This class explores the role of Sam Houston and the Rough Riders.
terminal: Describe the contributions of Sam Houston and the Rough Riders to the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Explain Sam Houston's leadership and military strategies
Discuss the formation and significance of the Rough Riders
Analyze Houston's influence on Texas's independence

classes.title: The Republic of Texas
classes.summary: This class covers the formation and early years of the Republic of Texas.
terminal: Describe the formation and characteristics of the Republic of Texas
enabling: Explain the transition from Mexican rule to the Republic of Texas
Discuss the challenges faced by the new republic
Identify the key political and economic developments during the republic's early years
